name: Homestyle Lasagna Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Shredded 28 oz Jar - Slow-Cooked Homestyle
Cook and drain.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large skillet, brown ground beef over medium heat until no longer pink, then drain fat.
3. Add mushrooms, onion, carrot, and garlic; sauté until vegetables are tender (about 5 minutes).
4. Stir in wine, nutmeg, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper; cook until wine is almost evaporated.
5. Remove from heat and let cool for 10-15 minutes.
6. In a medium bowl, mix meat mixture with mozzarella cheese, egg, and Parmesan cheese.
7. Spread 1/2 jar spaghetti sauce evenly in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
8. Place each lasagna noodle in the sauce; spread evenly over the length of each noodle (about 1/3 cup).
9. Roll up each noodle tightly, seam side down, and place seam-side down in the baking dish.
10. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 40 minutes.
11. Remove foil, sprinkle remaining Parmesan cheese on top, then bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until bubbly.
